name: The Sun Shines Twice
overview: A businesswoman who runs her father's companies, suffers some of those who try to defraud her to undermine her wealth, until she discovers that she has a brother from her father, so she looks for him to stand with her.

trailers.title: كواليس مسلسل الشمس تشرق مرتين..هدى حسين.wmv
